meta.purpose: Competitive research + product/pricing design for The Jade Oracle
sources: App Store / Google Play (Co-Star, The Pattern, Sanctuary, Lumi, Tarotoo)

key_trends: 30% of psychic consultations will involve AI tools by 2028
Live chat holds 45% share of paid interactions (younger demographic preference)
72% of paid interactions are microtransactions + subscription upgrades
65% of leading apps use multi-tier monetization
AI-generated persona businesses (Samira model) scaling fastest with zero human labor

psychic_samira.persona: AI-generated pink-haired figure, Fairycore/Witchcore aesthetic, culturally neutral

product_ladder.name: $1 Psychic Reading (First Customer Offer)
product_ladder.description: Entry hook. Customer submits up to 3 questions. Reading delivered via email in 2-3 days. 30 days of free follow-up readings included.
product_ladder.purpose: Psychological commitment device — once invested, users upsell themselves

product_ladder.name: Ask An Additional Question
product_ladder.purpose: Low-friction upsell for customers wanting more clarity

product_ladder.name: Full Psychic Reading by Samira
product_ladder.description: Comprehensive reading. Unlimited access for 30 days. Detailed readings within 24 hours.

product_ladder.name: Enhanced Reading
product_ladder.description: More comprehensive version of the full reading

product_ladder.name: Unlimited Psychic Readings (Monthly)
product_ladder.description: Unlimited access for 30 days. Ask as many questions as desired.

product_ladder.name: Relationship Analysis PDF
product_ladder.purpose: Niche digital product for love-focused customers

product_ladder.name: Yearly Astrology Reading
product_ladder.purpose: Seasonal product (sells heavily in Jan/New Year)

product_ladder.name: Samira Prime Yearly Membership
product_ladder.description: 40% off future readings, priority 2-6 hour delivery, free birthday reading, VIP bonuses

product_ladder.name: Unlimited Priority Readings — 1 Year
product_ladder.description: Gift card code for unlimited readings with Enhanced + Priority 12hr delivery for 1 year

funnel_structure.ad_strategy: AI face-swap + voice modulation = endless ad variations. Emotionally-driven creative mimicking personal notes, text messages, success stories.
funnel_structure.discount_codes: Heavy use of 100% OFF codes (as lead magnets / viral hooks)

key_insights: ALL digital — zero inventory, zero shipping
Readings likely AI-generated (multiple Trustpilot reviews confirm generic/template feel)
Persona is entirely AI — face changes between ad cycles
Heavy anchoring with crossed-out 'original' prices (50-75% discounts displayed)
Free unlimited readings as hook product converts to paid upgrades
Affiliate army drives significant traffic via discount codes

co_star.free_tier: Daily horoscope, basic chart, friend compatibility
co_star.paid_tier: Co-Star+, premium insights, detailed transit analysis
co_star.key_insight: AI-driven personalization increases engagement 20-35%. App-first, social-sharing drives virality.

the_pattern.free_tier: Basic patterns and timing insights (very limited)
the_pattern.key_insight: Most insights locked behind paywall. No free trial. High monthly price justified by depth of personality analysis.

sanctuary.key_insight: First app to offer live on-demand readings. Combines free content with per-minute live sessions.

tarotoo.free_tier: Core tarot readings, basic AI psychic chat, no registration required
tarotoo.paid_tier: Premium subscription ~$60/year — advanced spreads, unlimited AI psychic chat, expanded deck access, ad-free
tarotoo.key_insight: Free web readings drive massive traffic. Mobile app monetizes via subscriptions. AI psychic chat is the stickiest feature.

lumi_tarot.free_tier: 5 readings/day (burns through quickly — functions as trial)
lumi_tarot.paid_tier: Premium for unlimited readings + deeper interpretations
lumi_tarot.key_insight: Daily limit creates urgency. Users who are genuinely curious hit the wall fast and convert.

pocket_insight.pricing: Buy credits, spend on: pay-per-minute live chat, fixed-price text readings, premium rituals
pocket_insight.key_insight: No subscription pressure. Credits feel like a wallet, not a commitment. Premium services (candle rituals, reiki) command higher credit cost.

qmdj_practitioners_fiverr.key_insight: Very few English-speaking QMDJ practitioners exist. $30 is budget tier. Professional consultants in Singapore/Malaysia charge $200-500+ per session. Massive supply gap = pricing power.

monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.description: $1 entry, post-purchase upsells to $30-100 products, email nurture to membership
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.pros: Highest conversion rate, removes all friction, builds email list fast
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.cons: Requires ad spend to drive traffic, high volume needed

monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.description: Free daily readings, paywall for advanced features, $5-15/mo subscription
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.pros: Predictable MRR, high retention if product is sticky, scales with word-of-mouth
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.cons: Requires app development, app store fees (30%), long payback period

monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.description: Buy credits, spend on readings/chat. No subscription commitment.
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.pros: No subscription fatigue, whales subsidize casual users, flexible pricing
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.cons: Harder to predict revenue, requires constant re-engagement

monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.pros: High revenue per session, urgency drives spend
monetization_models_ranked_by_effectiven.cons: Requires human readers (or very good AI), harder to scale, scheduling complexity

hook_tier.psychology: Removes ALL friction. $1 creates psychological commitment (sunk cost). Free gets more sign-ups but lower quality leads.

entry_tier.psychology: Impulse purchase territory. Under $10 feels trivial. Under $20 requires no justification.
entry_tier.recommendation: $8.88 (auspicious number in Chinese culture, memorable, under $10)

core_tier.psychology: Considered purchase but not major. Anchored against premium to feel like a deal.

premium_tier.psychology: Signals quality and depth. Named 'analysis' or 'session' not 'reading'. Odd numbers ($97) feel calculated.
premium_tier.recommendation: $88 (auspicious, under $100, signals premium in Asian market)

high_ticket.psychology: Investment framing. Payment plans essential. Scarcity/exclusivity required.

subscription.psychology: Under $30/mo = 'Netflix for spiritual guidance'. First month discount (67% off) critical for conversion.

email_pdf.customer_preference: HIGH — most popular for paid readings
email_pdf.pros: Customers can re-read, no scheduling, private, works globally across timezones, low ops cost
email_pdf.cons: No real-time interaction, feels less 'personal' than live
email_pdf.recommendation: PRIMARY delivery for all tiers below $100

telegram_bot.customer_preference: MEDIUM — growing, especially in Asian markets
telegram_bot.pros: Instant delivery, conversational feel, already built (@Jade4134bot), free to operate, re-engagement via notifications
telegram_bot.cons: Requires user to have Telegram, less premium feel for high-ticket
telegram_bot.recommendation: FREE tier and daily readings. Also as delivery notification channel.

live_chat_web.customer_preference: HIGH for younger demographic (45% of paid interactions)
live_chat_web.pros: Immediate gratification, back-and-forth dialogue, higher engagement
live_chat_web.cons: Requires real-time AI, session management, higher server costs
live_chat_web.recommendation: FUTURE phase — add to Shopify store as premium feature

live_video_zoom.pros: Most personal, justifies premium pricing, builds deep trust
live_video_zoom.cons: Requires human practitioner (Jenn), scheduling, not scalable
live_video_zoom.recommendation: HIGH-TICKET only ($188+ QMDJ sessions). Jenn delivers personally.

shopify_digital_download.recommendation: CORE delivery for paid products ($8.88+). Automated PDF generation from QMDJ engine.

recommended_jade_oracle_product_lineup.positioning: The only AI oracle powered by REAL Qi Men Dun Jia (奇门遁甲) — the 5000-year-old Chinese imperial divination system. Not generic AI, not tarot — a genuine metaphysical engine that reads the energy of THIS MOMENT.
recommended_jade_oracle_product_lineup.differentiator_vs_samira: Samira sells generic AI-generated readings dressed as psychic intuition. Jade Oracle sells readings from a REAL system with verifiable calculations. The QMDJ chart is shown — customers can see the math behind the magic.
recommended_jade_oracle_product_lineup.auspicious_pricing_rationale: All prices use 8 (八 = prosperity in Chinese numerology). This is on-brand for a Chinese metaphysical product and memorable.

products.name: Daily Energy Reading (每日能量)
products.description: Free daily energy reading based on today's QMDJ chart. No user input needed — the chart captures the energy of THIS DAY. Shows: dominant energy, best action to take, what to avoid.
products.delivery: Telegram bot (@Jade4134bot) + Shopify landing page widget
products.purpose: Traffic magnet and habit formation. Users come back daily. Builds email/Telegram list.
products.automation: 100% automated. QMDJ engine generates daily chart at midnight UTC. Telegram bot sends push notification. Website auto-updates.
what_customer_gets: Today's dominant energy (element + stem + door)
One-sentence guidance for the day
Lucky direction and timing
Emoji-style energy meter (e.g. 🔥🔥🔥 Energy: Fire dominant)

products.name: $1 Moment Reading (此刻天机)
products.description: Ask ONE question. The QMDJ chart for THIS MOMENT reveals the answer. Uses current date/time — the customer's question activates the reading at the exact moment of asking.
products.delivery: Email (within 24hr) — beautifully formatted with QMDJ chart visual
products.purpose: Psychological commitment device. $1 → email capture → upsell funnel.
what_customer_gets: Full moment QMDJ chart (visual — 9 palaces with stars, doors, deities)
Interpretation of their question through the chart
Recommended action + timing
One follow-up clarification via email
products.automation: Semi-automated. QMDJ engine generates chart + base interpretation. AI enriches with personalized narrative. Human review optional.

products.name: Quick Clarity Reading (速答三问)
products.description: Ask up to 3 questions. Each gets a focused QMDJ moment reading. Perfect for specific decisions: Should I take this job? Is this person right for me? When should I act?
products.purpose: First real revenue product. Under $10 = impulse purchase from $1 customers.
what_customer_gets: 3 separate moment charts (one per question)
Focused interpretation for each question
Overall energy synthesis across all 3 questions
3-page PDF report with chart visuals
7-day follow-up email support
products.automation: Semi-automated. QMDJ engine generates 3 charts. AI writes interpretations. Formatted into branded PDF template.

products.name: Deep Insight Reading (深度洞察)
products.qmdj_mode: 时盘 (Moment Reading) + partial 命盘 elements
products.description: Comprehensive reading combining moment energy with birth date elements. Up to 3 detailed questions with deep QMDJ analysis including all 9 palaces, doors, stars, and deity interpretations.
products.purpose: Primary revenue driver. Anchored against $88 Destiny Reading to feel like a deal.
what_customer_gets: Full 9-palace QMDJ chart with detailed annotations
3 in-depth question analyses
Birth element compatibility check (basic 命盘 reference)
Personalized affirmation based on dominant energy
Optimal timing recommendations for the next 30 days
5-7 page branded PDF report
30-day follow-up email support
products.automation: Semi-automated. QMDJ engine + birth element cross-reference. AI narrative. PDF generation.

products.name: Destiny Blueprint (命盘天书)
products.description: Full destiny reading using birth date/time/location. Reveals life path, innate strengths, hidden challenges, and optimal life direction through the complete QMDJ destiny chart.
products.purpose: High-value product that uses birth data (命盘 mode). Unique to Jade Oracle — no competitor offers QMDJ destiny readings at scale.
what_customer_gets: Complete QMDJ destiny chart based on birth data
Life path analysis (天命 reading)
Innate strengths and hidden talents
Challenges and growth areas with specific guidance
Relationship compatibility profile
Career alignment analysis
Health tendencies and body constitution
Optimal life direction and timing windows
10-15 page premium PDF report with full chart visuals
60-day follow-up email support
products.automation: Semi-automated. QMDJ engine computes full destiny chart. AI generates comprehensive narrative. Premium PDF template.

products.name: QMDJ Strategic Session (奇门策略会)
products.description: Live 45-minute video session with a QMDJ practitioner. Combines your destiny chart with real-time moment analysis for strategic life/business decisions. The imperial advisor experience.
products.delivery: Live Zoom/Google Meet (scheduled) + session recording + PDF summary
products.purpose: High-ticket conversion. Positions Jade Oracle as legitimate practitioner, not just AI. Jenn delivers personally (limited availability creates scarcity).
what_customer_gets: 45-minute live video session (not 30 — differentiate from Samira's $97)
Pre-session destiny chart preparation
Real-time QMDJ chart cast during session
Strategic timing analysis for specific decisions
Direction and positioning recommendations
Session recording (MP4)
Follow-up PDF summary with key insights and action items
90-day email support
products.automation: Manual. Jenn conducts live. QMDJ engine pre-generates charts. AI drafts follow-up PDF.

products.name: Jade Circle Monthly (翡翠圈)
products.description: Monthly subscription for ongoing spiritual guidance. Weekly energy forecasts, monthly personal reading, member-only Telegram group, discounts on all products.
products.delivery: Telegram group + email + Shopify member portal
products.purpose: Predictable MRR. Retention engine. Community builds loyalty and reduces churn.
what_customer_gets: Weekly QMDJ energy forecast (automated, delivered every Monday)
Monthly personal mini-reading (1 question, delivered via email)
Access to private Jade Circle Telegram group
20% discount on all paid readings
Priority booking for QMDJ Strategic Sessions
Monthly full/new moon energy readings
Exclusive content: QMDJ education, Chinese metaphysics basics
products.automation: 90% automated. Weekly forecasts from QMDJ engine. Monthly reading semi-automated. Telegram group moderated by AI + Jenn.

products.name: Year of Jade (翡翠之年)
products.qmdj_mode: 命盘 + 12 monthly 时盘 readings
products.description: Annual package: Full destiny blueprint + monthly moment readings for an entire year. The complete Jade Oracle experience.
products.delivery: Email PDF (destiny report in 72hr) + monthly email readings + priority Telegram access
products.purpose: Whale product. Maximum LTV. Competes with Samira's $994 yearly but at lower price with more value.
what_customer_gets: Full Destiny Blueprint (命盘天书) — the $88 product
12 monthly personal readings (one per month, timed to new moon)
Quarterly deep-dive readings (4x per year, timed to solstices/equinoxes)
Jade Circle membership included for the full year
2 priority QMDJ Strategic Session bookings (normally $188 each)
Personalized annual energy calendar
Direct Telegram access to Jade Oracle team
products.automation: Mix. Destiny report semi-automated. Monthly readings automated. Sessions manual.

sources: SEO (QMDJ keywords — very low competition in English)
step_1_traffic.hook: Daily free reading on landing page + Telegram bot

step_2_conversion.landing_page: $1 Moment Reading — 'Ask the Oracle anything. Just $1.'

step_3_post_purchase_upsell_1.trigger: Immediately after $1 purchase on thank-you page

sequence.email: Free daily reading link + Telegram invite (1hr after)
Your reading is being prepared (anticipation builder)
Educational content: What is QMDJ? (builds authority)
Deep Insight Reading offer (20% off code)
Destiny Blueprint offer (命盘 = life changing)
Re-engagement + testimonial request + 50% off next reading

unique_jade_oracle_advantages: REAL SYSTEM: QMDJ is a verifiable mathematical system — charts can be shown, calculations are real. Samira has zero verifiable methodology.
CULTURAL AUTHENTICITY: Jenn studies under 长卿 (Chang Qing). Genuine lineage, not invented persona.
TWO MODES: 时盘 (moment) for instant questions + 命盘 (destiny) for deep life readings. No competitor offers both.
AUTOMATION: QMDJ engine (qmdj-calc.py) generates charts programmatically. Near-zero marginal cost per reading.
NICHE POSITIONING: 'AI + ancient Chinese divination' has almost zero competition in English market. QMDJ keywords are blue ocean SEO.
VISUAL DIFFERENTIATION: 9-palace QMDJ chart is visually distinct from tarot cards or birth charts. Instantly recognizable.
BILINGUAL: Chinese + English capability opens both Western seekers AND diaspora Chinese market.
EXISTING INFRASTRUCTURE: Telegram bot live, QMDJ engine built, Shopify store in progress, content pipeline operational.

phase_1_mvp.automation_needed: QMDJ engine → formatted reading text → email delivery

phase_2_monetize.automation_needed: PDF generation pipeline, upsell page, email automation

phase_3_scale.automation_needed: 命盘 mode full automation, subscription billing, Telegram group
